description: A young boy who, along with his childhood friend [Suzu Kanade](https://anilist.co/character/174838/), can see ayakashi (a type of spirit). After he learned about Suzu's status as an Ayakashi Maiden from his grandfather, he became an exorcist ninja in order to protect her from harm.

name: Mostima
description: __Place of Birth:__ Laterano A transporter for Penguin Logistics who always acts alone. Nothing is known about her previous work history. As a Lateranian, she is entitled to wielding firearms per Laterano Law but she chooses to use two staves, known as "The Black Lock" and "The White Key". It is speculated that she refuses to use a gun after she "pointed" her firearms towards her kind, making her a fallen angel. She is acquainted with Exusiai.

name: Motoko Aoyama
description: __Height__: 175cm (5'9") Motoko Aoyama is a 15-year-old high school girl who is very formal and into kendo, to the point that her room resembles that of a samurai's (complete with a suit of armor). She claims lineage to a school of demonslaying swordsmen and also displays a prodigious competence with her katana. name: Tae-O Jin
description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'6.5") Teddy Jin is a secondary character of the Webtoon Weak Hero. He is a student in Class 1-1 of Eunjang High School. He was an infamous bully from Seong-Il Middle School. Initially, a supporting antagonist of the Eunjang Arc, his fight with Gray Yeon has humbled Teddy into becoming an ally of Gray taking on a more anti-heroic role. Following the Hyeongshin Takedown Operation, Teddy has become a reluctant ally of Ben Park's Gang.
